contextBanner: [TBG | Continue Visible Trade Cycle | unattended harness | branch: agent/route-automation-operator-plan]
purpose: Pin and prove one explicit development save, travel through Bannerlord movement, enter a town, perform one real buy, leave the Inventory or Trade surface visible to the user, and prove targeted Manual cleanup without cheats, fabricated deltas, or human hotkey input.
allowedScope: explicit BlacksmithGuild_DevStart save pinning and runtime identity verification
targeted MapTrade Automation and Manual commands
town arrival and trade execution through Bannerlord mechanisms
fresh correlated machine evidence and bounded English reporting
forbiddenScope: free gold, items, mounts, stamina, XP, or movement
fake or arithmetically inconsistent inventory and gold deltas
route-start-only claims presented as arrival or trade
command ACK presented as asynchronous completion or Manual cleanup
unnamed native Continue presented as exact-save proof
global Automation when only MapTrade is under test
stale, different-run, different-head, or different-save evidence accepted as current PASS
diagnostic or skip mode accepted as PASS
commands sent to a Bannerlord session the runner did not launch

saveRoots: Documents\Mount and Blade II Bannerlord\Game Saves
Documents\Mount and Blade II Bannerlord\Game Saves\Native

launcherPolicy.focusAuthority: explicit AllowFocusSteal from unattended operator wrapper
launcherPolicy.failedSpawnCleanup: close only the exact fresh PID/HWND absent from the S1 baseline and bound by this run's launcher context, after shared detection proves no live game runtime

orderedHandoffs.input: TbgVisibleTradeCycleRequest.v1 with runId, requestedSaveId, and headSha
orderedHandoffs.requiredOutput: TbgSaveIdentityEvidence.v1 whose loadedSaveId and MBSaveLoad.ActiveSaveSlotName exactly equal requestedSaveId

orderedHandoffs.input: verified campaign attach for the correlated run and head

orderedHandoffs.requiredOutput: MapTrade=Automation while every non-MapTrade engine remains at its baseline mode
fresh correlated route start, positive party-position delta, and exact-target arrival
one bounded Bannerlord buy with non-fake, arithmetically consistent gold and inventory deltas
Inventory or Trade surface visibly open at the arrived settlement

orderedHandoffs.input: terminal runtime evidence followed by SetMapTradeManual
orderedHandoffs.requiredOutput: fresh Manual authority state plus bounded linked JSON and syntactic-English results

currentBlockers: No PASS is valid until this exact committed head has fresh correlated evidence from all required runtime producers.
A pinned file timestamp is only a Continue preference; MBSaveLoad.ActiveSaveSlotName is the loaded-save authority.
Command acknowledgements are accepted only as transport outcomes and never as route, trade, visibility, or cleanup proof.
The final Inventory or Trade surface must remain visible to the user after the runner returns MapTrade to Manual.
The runner intentionally leaves the game open so the proven trade surface can be observed; it does not claim a process-stop outcome.
Sell, smithing, horse, companion, and multi-cycle orchestration remain outside this one-real-buy certificate.
